items.prompt: FRAMING: extreme low-angle, near-macro locked-off shot on a single cracked bronze temple bell hung dead-centre in a void of black, the vault soaring monumentally away above it so the bell is utterly dwarfed and scale is unknowable, a near-imperceptible slow push-in through drifting ash, shallow focus holding the bell's veined metal razor-sharp while everything beyond falls soft, sacred-dread stillness with the bell barely swaying. SETTING: INT./void, time unknowable, the cracked bronze bell hung in the broken stone ribs of a CSMT-style colonial Indo-Saracenic pointed arch whose stained glass is long gone, indo-gothic fusion of rock-cut temple-grade cast bronze + Victorian-Gothic pointed-arch ribs + the snapped rebar and concrete of the WWIII modern ruin fused into the broken stone, era-strata touching in the single fragment, the vault above lost entirely in red fog, drifting ash suspended in dead air, a single hair-thin blue-white thread of light flickering once across the black then swallowed, the bell the lone warm-yet-cold sacred source. LOOK-LOCK: Palette: Crimson corruption red #8B1A1A, Soot / ash black #171311, Ash gray #6E6A66, Rust / dried-blood maroon #5C2A1E, Diseased gold #9C7B2E, Sanctuary cold blue / river cyan #3E7C8C, Divine blue-white #BFE3F2, Dream blue-violet / magenta #5B3A8C. Lighting: Desaturated near-monochrome ground so a single accent detonates — ONE accent per frame, crimson OR blue-white, never both. Fog and sodium-lantern amber hide and reveal. A single warm/sacred source per frame is the 'bonfire': the cracked blue-white relic, a self-ringing bell, the guttering roadside lamp, the lone shaft in Vasuki's cavern. The hair-thin blue-white thread of light is the signature lifeline running through the dark. Diseased gold reads as sickly rot, never warmth or festival richness — wealth as disease.
